option.name: originalContent
option.value:
name: Windows Packaging
on: workflow_call: inputs: publish_enabled: required: true type: string
jobs:
build_installer: runs-on: windows-latest steps: - uses: actions/checkout@v5
- name: Set up Go uses: actions/setup-go@v6 with: go-version: '1.26'
- name: Build Windows binary shell: pwsh run: | $env:GOOS = "windows" $env:GOARCH = "amd64" go build -v -o kemforge.exe .
- name: Update Defender signatures shell: pwsh run: Update-MpSignature
- name: Scan binary for malware shell: pwsh run: | $target = "$env:GITHUB_WORKSPACE\kemforge.exe" Start-MpScan -ScanType CustomScan -ScanPath $target $threats = Get-MpThreat if ($threats) { Write-Error "Malware detected in ${target}:`n$($threats | Format-List | Out-String)" exit 1 } Write-Output "No threats detected in $target"
- name: Create MSIX package shell: pwsh run: | New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path packaging/Assets Copy-Item kemforge.exe packaging/kemforge.exe pwsh -File scripts/resize-icons.ps1 $makeappx = Get-ChildItem "C:\Program Files (x86)\Windows Kits\10\bin\10.*\x64\makeappx.exe" | Sort-Object FullName -Descending | Select-Object -First 1 & $makeappx.FullName pack /d packaging /p kemforge.msix /o
- name: Scan MSIX for malware shell: pwsh run: | $target = "$env:GITHUB_WORKSPACE\kemforge.msix" Start-MpScan -ScanType CustomScan -ScanPath $target $threats = Get-MpThreat if ($threats) { Write-Error "Malware detected in ${target}:`n$($threats | Format-List | Out-String)" exit 1 } Write-Output "No threats detected in $target"
- name: Azure Login uses: azure/login@v2 with: creds: '{"clientId":"${{ secrets.AZURE_CLIENT_ID }}","clientSecret":"${{ secrets.AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET }}","subscriptionId":"${{ secrets.AZURE_SUBSCRIPTION_ID }}","tenantId":"${{ secrets.AZURE_TENANT_ID }}"}'
- name: Sign installer with Azure Trusted Signing uses: azure/trusted-signing-action@v0.5.0 with: azure-tenant-id: ${{ secrets.AZURE_TENANT_ID }} azure-client-id: ${{ secrets.AZURE_CLIENT_ID }} azure-client-secret: ${{ secrets.AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET }} endpoint: ${{ secrets.AZURE_SIGNING_ENDPOINT }} trusted-signing-account-name: ${{ secrets.AZURE_SIGNING_ACCOUNT }} certificate-profile-name: ${{ secrets.AZURE_CERTIFICATE_PROFILE }} files-folder: ${{ github.workspace }} files-folder-filter: msix file-digest: SHA256 timestamp-rfc3161: http://timestamp.acs.microsoft.com timestamp-digest: SHA256
- name: Remove unsigned executable shell: pwsh run: Remove-Item kemforge.exe
- name: Install signed MSIX package shell: pwsh run: Add-AppxPackage -Path kemforge.msix
- name: Validate installation shell: pwsh run: kemforge --help
- name: Upload signed installer uses: actions/upload-artifact@v6 with: name: kemforge-installer-signed path: kemforge.msix
chocobuild: runs-on: windows-latest steps: - uses: actions/checkout@v5
- name: Set up Go uses: actions/setup-go@v6 with: go-version: '1.26'
- name: Build Windows binary shell: pwsh run: | $env:GOOS = "windows" $env:GOARCH = "amd64" go build -v -o kemforge.exe .
- name: Update Defender signatures shell: pwsh run: Update-MpSignature
- name: Scan executable for malware shell: pwsh run: | $target = "$env:GITHUB_WORKSPACE\kemforge.exe" Start-MpScan -ScanType CustomScan -ScanPath $target $threats = Get-MpThreat if ($threats) { Write-Error "Malware detected in ${target}:`n$($threats | Format-List | Out-String)" exit 1 } Write-Output "No threats detected in $target"
- name: Azure Login uses: azure/login@v2 with: creds: '{"clientId":"${{ secrets.AZURE_CLIENT_ID }}","clientSecret":"${{ secrets.AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET }}","subscriptionId":"${{ secrets.AZURE_SUBSCRIPTION_ID }}","tenantId":"${{ secrets.AZURE_TENANT_ID }}"}'
- name: Sign executable with Azure Trusted Signing uses: azure/trusted-signing-action@v0.5.0 with: azure-tenant-id: ${{ secrets.AZURE_TENANT_ID }} azure-client-id: ${{ secrets.AZURE_CLIENT_ID }} azure-client-secret: ${{ secrets.AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET }} endpoint: ${{ secrets.AZURE_SIGNING_ENDPOINT }} trusted-signing-account-name: ${{ secrets.AZURE_SIGNING_ACCOUNT }} certificate-profile-name: ${{ secrets.AZURE_CERTIFICATE_PROFILE }} files-folder: ${{ github.workspace }} files-folder-filter: exe file-digest: SHA256 timestamp-rfc3161: http://timestamp.acs.microsoft.com timestamp-digest: SHA256
- name: Prepare Chocolatey package structure shell: pwsh run: | Copy-Item kemforge.exe chocolatey/tools/kemforge.exe (Get-Content scripts/VERIFICATION.txt.template) -replace 'COMMIT_SHA_PLACEHOLDER', '${{ github.sha }}' | Set-Content chocolatey/tools/VERIFICATION.txt -Encoding utf8
- name: Pack Chocolatey package shell: pwsh run: | Set-Location chocolatey choco pack
- name: Install Chocolatey package shell: pwsh run: | Set-Location chocolatey choco install kemforge --source . -y
- name: Verify kemforge installation shell: pwsh run: kemforge -I https://www.google.com
- name: Upload Chocolatey package artifact uses: actions/upload-artifact@v6 with: name: choco-package path: chocolatey/kemforge.*.nupkg
deploychoco: needs: [chocobuild] if: inputs.publish_enabled == 'true' && github.ref_name == 'main' runs-on: windows-latest environment: chocolatey steps: - name: Download Chocolatey package artifact uses: actions/download-artifact@v4 with: name: choco-package
- name: Push Chocolatey package shell: pwsh env: CHOCO_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.CHOCO_API_KEY }} run: | $pkg = (Get-Item *.nupkg).FullName choco push $pkg --source https://push.chocolatey.org/ --api-key $env:CHOCO_API_KEY
release_windows: if: inputs.publish_enabled == 'true' && github.ref_name == 'main' runs-on: windows-latest permissions: contents: write steps: - uses: actions/checkout@v5
- name: Set up Go uses: actions/setup-go@v6 with: go-version: '1.26'
- name: Build Windows binary shell: pwsh run: | $env:GOOS = "windows" $env:GOARCH = "amd64" go build -v -o kemforge.exe .
- name: Update Defender signatures shell: pwsh run: Update-MpSignature
- name: Scan executable for malware shell: pwsh run: | $target = "$env:GITHUB_WORKSPACE\kemforge.exe" Start-MpScan -ScanType CustomScan -ScanPath $target $threats = Get-MpThreat if ($threats) { Write-Error "Malware detected in ${target}:`n$($threats | Format-List | Out-String)" exit 1 } Write-Output "No threats detected in $target"
- name: Azure Login uses: azure/login@v2 with: creds: '{"clientId":"${{ secrets.AZURE_CLIENT_ID }}","clientSecret":"${{ secrets.AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET }}","subscriptionId":"${{ secrets.AZURE_SUBSCRIPTION_ID }}","tenantId":"${{ secrets.AZURE_TENANT_ID }}"}'
- name: Sign executable with Azure Trusted Signing uses: azure/trusted-signing-action@v0.5.0 with: azure-tenant-id: ${{ secrets.AZURE_TENANT_ID }} azure-client-id: ${{ secrets.AZURE_CLIENT_ID }} azure-client-secret: ${{ secrets.AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET }} endpoint: ${{ secrets.AZURE_SIGNING_ENDPOINT }} trusted-signing-account-name: ${{ secrets.AZURE_SIGNING_ACCOUNT }} certificate-profile-name: ${{ secrets.AZURE_CERTIFICATE_PROFILE }} files-folder: ${{ github.workspace }} files-folder-filter: exe file-digest: SHA256 timestamp-rfc3161: http://timestamp.acs.microsoft.com timestamp-digest: SHA256
- name: Create zip shell: pwsh run: Compress-Archive -Path kemforge.exe -DestinationPath kemforge.zip
- name: Compute SHA256 shell: pwsh run: | $hash = (Get-FileHash kemforge.zip -Algorithm SHA256).Hash Write-Output "SHA256: $hash"
- name: Create GitHub Release id: release uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2 with: tag_name: v1.3.2 name: v1.3.2 files: kemforge.zip token: ${{ github.token }}
- name: Echo asset download URL shell: pwsh run: | $assets = '${{ steps.release.outputs.assets }}' | ConvertFrom-Json Write-Output "Download URL: $($assets[0].browser_download_url)"

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
name: Windows Packaging
on: workflow_call: inputs: publish_enabled: required: true type: string
jobs:
build_installer: runs-on: windows-latest steps: - uses: actions/checkout@v5
- name: Set up Go uses: actions/setup-go@v6 with: go-version: '1.26'
- name: Build Windows binary shell: pwsh run: | $env:GOOS = "windows" $env:GOARCH = "amd64" go build -v -o kemforge.exe .
- name: Create MSIX package shell: pwsh run: | New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path packaging/Assets Copy-Item kemforge.exe packaging/kemforge.exe pwsh -File scripts/resize-icons.ps1 $makeappx = Get-ChildItem "C:\Program Files (x86)\Windows Kits\10\bin\10.*\x64\makeappx.exe" | Sort-Object FullName -Descending | Select-Object -First 1 & $makeappx.FullName pack /d packaging /p kemforge.msix /o
- name: Azure Login uses: azure/login@v2 with: creds: '{"clientId":"${{ secrets.AZURE_CLIENT_ID }}","clientSecret":"${{ secrets.AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET }}","subscriptionId":"${{ secrets.AZURE_SUBSCRIPTION_ID }}","tenantId":"${{ secrets.AZURE_TENANT_ID }}"}'
- name: Sign installer with Azure Trusted Signing uses: azure/trusted-signing-action@v0.5.0 with: azure-tenant-id: ${{ secrets.AZURE_TENANT_ID }} azure-client-id: ${{ secrets.AZURE_CLIENT_ID }} azure-client-secret: ${{ secrets.AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET }} endpoint: ${{ secrets.AZURE_SIGNING_ENDPOINT }} trusted-signing-account-name: ${{ secrets.AZURE_SIGNING_ACCOUNT }} certificate-profile-name: ${{ secrets.AZURE_CERTIFICATE_PROFILE }} files-folder: ${{ github.workspace }} files-folder-filter: msix file-digest: SHA256 timestamp-rfc3161: http://timestamp.acs.microsoft.com timestamp-digest: SHA256
- name: Update Defender signatures shell: pwsh run: Update-MpSignature
- name: Scan signed MSIX for malware shell: pwsh run: | $target = "$env:GITHUB_WORKSPACE\kemforge.msix" Start-MpScan -ScanType CustomScan -ScanPath $target $threats = Get-MpThreat if ($threats) { Write-Error "Malware detected in ${target}:`n$($threats | Format-List | Out-String)" exit 1 } Write-Output "No threats detected in $target"
- name: Remove unsigned executable shell: pwsh run: Remove-Item kemforge.exe
- name: Install signed MSIX package shell: pwsh run: Add-AppxPackage -Path kemforge.msix
- name: Validate installation shell: pwsh run: kemforge --help
- name: Upload signed installer uses: actions/upload-artifact@v6 with: name: kemforge-installer-signed path: kemforge.msix
chocobuild: runs-on: windows-latest steps: - uses: actions/checkout@v5
- name: Set up Go uses: actions/setup-go@v6 with: go-version: '1.26'
- name: Build Windows binary shell: pwsh run: | $env:GOOS = "windows" $env:GOARCH = "amd64" go build -v -o kemforge.exe .
- name: Azure Login uses: azure/login@v2 with: creds: '{"clientId":"${{ secrets.AZURE_CLIENT_ID }}","clientSecret":"${{ secrets.AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET }}","subscriptionId":"${{ secrets.AZURE_SUBSCRIPTION_ID }}","tenantId":"${{ secrets.AZURE_TENANT_ID }}"}'
- name: Sign executable with Azure Trusted Signing uses: azure/trusted-signing-action@v0.5.0 with: azure-tenant-id: ${{ secrets.AZURE_TENANT_ID }} azure-client-id: ${{ secrets.AZURE_CLIENT_ID }} azure-client-secret: ${{ secrets.AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET }} endpoint: ${{ secrets.AZURE_SIGNING_ENDPOINT }} trusted-signing-account-name: ${{ secrets.AZURE_SIGNING_ACCOUNT }} certificate-profile-name: ${{ secrets.AZURE_CERTIFICATE_PROFILE }} files-folder: ${{ github.workspace }} files-folder-filter: exe file-digest: SHA256 timestamp-rfc3161: http://timestamp.acs.microsoft.com timestamp-digest: SHA256
- name: Update Defender signatures shell: pwsh run: Update-MpSignature
- name: Scan signed executable for malware shell: pwsh run: | $target = "$env:GITHUB_WORKSPACE\kemforge.exe" Start-MpScan -ScanType CustomScan -ScanPath $target $threats = Get-MpThreat if ($threats) { Write-Error "Malware detected in ${target}:`n$($threats | Format-List | Out-String)" exit 1 } Write-Output "No threats detected in $target"
- name: Prepare Chocolatey package structure shell: pwsh run: | Copy-Item kemforge.exe chocolatey/tools/kemforge.exe (Get-Content scripts/VERIFICATION.txt.template) -replace 'COMMIT_SHA_PLACEHOLDER', '${{ github.sha }}' | Set-Content chocolatey/tools/VERIFICATION.txt -Encoding utf8
- name: Pack Chocolatey package shell: pwsh run: | Set-Location chocolatey choco pack
- name: Install Chocolatey package shell: pwsh run: | Set-Location chocolatey choco install kemforge --source . -y
- name: Verify kemforge installation shell: pwsh run: kemforge -I https://www.google.com
- name: Upload Chocolatey package artifact uses: actions/upload-artifact@v6 with: name: choco-package path: chocolatey/kemforge.*.nupkg
deploychoco: needs: [chocobuild] if: inputs.publish_enabled == 'true' && github.ref_name == 'main' runs-on: windows-latest environment: chocolatey steps: - name: Download Chocolatey package artifact uses: actions/download-artifact@v4 with: name: choco-package
- name: Push Chocolatey package shell: pwsh env: CHOCO_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.CHOCO_API_KEY }} run: | $pkg = (Get-Item *.nupkg).FullName choco push $pkg --source https://push.chocolatey.org/ --api-key $env:CHOCO_API_KEY
release_windows: if: inputs.publish_enabled == 'true' && github.ref_name == 'main' runs-on: windows-latest permissions: contents: write steps: - uses: actions/checkout@v5
- name: Set up Go uses: actions/setup-go@v6 with: go-version: '1.26'
- name: Build Windows binary shell: pwsh run: | $env:GOOS = "windows" $env:GOARCH = "amd64" go build -v -o kemforge.exe .
- name: Azure Login uses: azure/login@v2 with: creds: '{"clientId":"${{ secrets.AZURE_CLIENT_ID }}","clientSecret":"${{ secrets.AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET }}","subscriptionId":"${{ secrets.AZURE_SUBSCRIPTION_ID }}","tenantId":"${{ secrets.AZURE_TENANT_ID }}"}'
- name: Sign executable with Azure Trusted Signing uses: azure/trusted-signing-action@v0.5.0 with: azure-tenant-id: ${{ secrets.AZURE_TENANT_ID }} azure-client-id: ${{ secrets.AZURE_CLIENT_ID }} azure-client-secret: ${{ secrets.AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET }} endpoint: ${{ secrets.AZURE_SIGNING_ENDPOINT }} trusted-signing-account-name: ${{ secrets.AZURE_SIGNING_ACCOUNT }} certificate-profile-name: ${{ secrets.AZURE_CERTIFICATE_PROFILE }} files-folder: ${{ github.workspace }} files-folder-filter: exe file-digest: SHA256 timestamp-rfc3161: http://timestamp.acs.microsoft.com timestamp-digest: SHA256
- name: Update Defender signatures shell: pwsh run: Update-MpSignature
- name: Scan signed executable for malware shell: pwsh run: | $target = "$env:GITHUB_WORKSPACE\kemforge.exe" Start-MpScan -ScanType CustomScan -ScanPath $target $threats = Get-MpThreat if ($threats) { Write-Error "Malware detected in ${target}:`n$($threats | Format-List | Out-String)" exit 1 } Write-Output "No threats detected in $target"
- name: Create zip shell: pwsh run: Compress-Archive -Path kemforge.exe -DestinationPath kemforge.zip
- name: Compute SHA256 shell: pwsh run: | $hash = (Get-FileHash kemforge.zip -Algorithm SHA256).Hash Write-Output "SHA256: $hash"
- name: Create GitHub Release id: release uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2 with: tag_name: v1.3.2 name: v1.3.2 files: kemforge.zip token: ${{ github.token }}
- name: Echo asset download URL shell: pwsh run: | $assets = '${{ steps.release.outputs.assets }}' | ConvertFrom-Json Write-Output "Download URL: $($assets[0].browser_download_url)"
